---
title: "Case Studies"
description: "Cold War, OPEC, climate, market design, sports, poker — theory meets historical reality."
listing:
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [title, description, date, categories]
---

::: {.topic-card-label}
<span data-topic-count="case-studies"></span> TUTORIALS
:::

# Case Studies

Cold War, OPEC, climate, market design, sports, poker — theory meets historical reality.
